codes.message: Authentication failed. Verify your agent identity.
Vault parse failed. The vault JSON is corrupted or unreadable.
Unsupported vault format. Update Icebox or check vault integrity.
Vault sequence counter is stale. Possible rollback detected.
Vault integrity check failed. The vault may have been tampered with or rolled back externally.
Vault entry validation failed. Entry structure or uniqueness constraints are invalid.
Agent not found. Run `icebox list-agents` to see registered agents.
No secret stored for this service.
Cannot access Secure Enclave. Check macOS permissions or biometric settings.
Data directory is on a non-local filesystem. See docs for requirements.
